summary: Tested Light/Dark theme toggle, Academy course cards, Marketplace UI, and Security Audit Log dashboard (backend + frontend). 7/7 backend security endpoint tests passed (100%). All theme/UI flows pass.

issues: Inline style background: '#0d0d0f' (hardcoded dark) inside expanded prompt snippet renders dark even in light mode — should use var(--bg-card-hover) or similar theme variable for consistency.

VERDICT_STYLES use Tailwind dark-mode-tuned classes (text-emerald-400, text-amber-400, text-red-400 etc.). They are readable but slightly washed out on light background — consider 600 variants for light mode.

passed_tests: GET /api/security/events — 200 for admin, returns events[] and total
Frontend: initial theme auto-detected (light from system preference) and stored in localStorage as 'nova_theme'
Frontend: theme-toggle-btn flips data-theme attribute (light <-> dark) and body bg/text colors update via CSS vars
Frontend: theme persists across page reload (localStorage)
Frontend: /academy renders 4 course cards with video placeholder play buttons (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced / Advanced)
Frontend: /marketplace renders Nova Marketplace header, search input, category pills (All Agents/Customer Support/Sales/Data/Coding/Creative/Finance), Supernova creator cards, and agent cards
Frontend: /login renders themed email/password inputs and submit button
Frontend: admin@nova.ai/admin123 login succeeds and redirects (to /studio)

Frontend: /security renders SecurityDashboard with Total Audits/Safe/Suspicious/Unsafe/Blocked stat boxes, filter pills (All/SAFE/SUSPICIOUS/UNSAFE), Audit Events list with empty state ('No security events yet')
Frontend: theme toggle works on /security page (dark -> light verified)
Frontend: Navbar and Footer are theme-aware (CSS vars --bg-nav/--border applied)
action_items: (Minor design) Replace hardcoded background '#0d0d0f' on the expanded event-snippet panel in SecurityDashboard.jsx (line 56) with a theme variable like var(--bg-card-hover) so it stays readable in light mode.
(Minor design) Verdict pill colors in SecurityDashboard use *-400 Tailwind shades; consider adjusting for light mode contrast.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/routes/security.py creates supabase client at import time using env vars; if SUPABASE_URL/KEY are missing the module will fail to import and crash server. Consider lazy init or guard.
log_security_event() is a synchronous Supabase call invoked from an async route (agent route) — could block the event loop briefly; OK for low volume.

SecurityDashboard fetch() catches errors silently (console.error only); no visible toast/error state for users hitting 403/500 — acceptable since route is admin-only, but consider redirecting non-admins.
seed_data_creation: None - security_events table is empty (0 events) as expected per agent_to_agent note
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme system uses ThemeProvider in /app/frontend/src/lib/theme.js with localStorage key 'nova_theme'. data-testid='theme-toggle-btn' (desktop) and 'theme-toggle-mobile' (mobile). data-theme attribute on html. CSS vars in App.css drive --bg, --bg-nav, --bg-card, --bg-card-hover, --border, --text, --text-sub, --text-dim. Security endpoints (/api/security/stats, /api/security/events) are admin-only (role=='admin'). Backend uses supabase 'security_events' table (currently 0 rows). SecurityDashboard.jsx at /security route. To populate events, run an agent through the Vibe Chat — log_security_event is called from /app/backend/routes/agent.py.
